Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the Anabyn Premium Gallery.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug for the product.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

images.description: An array of image URLs for the product.

moq.description: Minimum Order Quantity for the product.

leadTime.description: The lead time for the product.

tags.description: An array of tags associated with the product.

published.description: Indicates whether the product is published or not.

createdAt.description: The date and time the product was created.

Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: Represents an inquiry made by a customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Inquiry entity.

name.description: The name of the person making the inquiry.

company.description: The company of the person making the inquiry.

email.description: The email address of the person making the inquiry.

phone.description: The phone number of the person making the inquiry.

whatsappOptIn.description: Indicates whether the person opted in to WhatsApp communication.

message.description: The message included in the inquiry.

products.description: An array of product IDs and quantities included in the inquiry.

type.description: The type of inquiry (sample, general, bulk).

status.description: The status of the inquiry (new, contacted, quoted, done).

source.description: The source of the inquiry (site, whatsapp).

createdAt.description: The date and time the inquiry was created.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Represents an admin user with access to the dashboard.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Admin entity. This matches the Firebase Auth UID.

name.description: The name of the admin user.

email.description: The email address of the admin user.

role.description: The role of the admin user.

definition.description: Stores product information. Each document represents a single product. Includes denormalized 'isAdmin' field for authorization independence.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product.

definition.description: Stores customer inquiries. Each document represents a single inquiry. Includes denormalized 'isAdmin' field for authorization independence.

params.name: inquiryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the inquiry.

definition.description: Stores admin user profiles.  The document ID is the Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: uid
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the admin user.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore structure prioritizes security and scalability by adhering to the principles of Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and Access Modeling.  Authorization Independence is achieved through denormalization of admin roles into the `inquiries` and `products` collections. This eliminates the need for `get()` calls in security rules, enabling atomic operations and simplifying debugging. Structural Segregation is implemented by separating the `admin` collection, which stores sensitive role data, from other data collections. This ensures that only authenticated admins can access and modify inquiries and products. The data structure also facilitates QAPs by segregating data based on access control requirements, and by incorporating the denormalized `isAdmin` field into the documents requiring authorization.
